title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at SIDBI

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at SIDBI
jsonLd.description:
We at SIDBI are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SIDBI:
SIDBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI!
